name: 2.8" ILI9341 TFT Module (240x320, SPI+Touch+SD, MSP2807)
description: Classic 2.8 inch 240x320 TFT module (ILI9341V + resistive touch + microSD, lcdwiki MSP2807), 14-pin SPI/touch header + 4-pin SD header, 50x86mm board, four 3.2mm holes.
dimensions_source: lcdwiki MSP2807 factory outline V1.0 (2024-04-11): board 50x86 t1.6, holes D3.2/pad4.7 (top 3.0/3.0, pitch 44x76.08), J2 14-pin 2.54 bottom row 2.0 (pin1 8.49 from left), J4 SD 4-pin top centered, touch glass 50x69.2, AA 43.2x57.6 (top 9.3). Official lib has only the 2.4-inch CR2013 sibling.

provenance.dimensions_source: lcdwiki MSP2807 factory outline V1.0 (2024-04-11): board 50x86 t1.6, holes D3.2/pad4.7 (top 3.0/3.0, pitch 44x76.08), J2 14-pin 2.54 bottom row 2.0 (pin1 8.49 from left), J4 SD 4-pin top centered, touch glass 50x69.2, AA 43.2x57.6 (top 9.3). Official lib has only the 2.4-inch CR2013 sibling.

quality_gates.enforcement: CI runs all gates on every push and blocks deployment on any failure
